texto: This was our last night. We only had one curtain call, Bree. And I thought they were going to give us a standing ovation, but no-o-o-. Do you know why half the audience stood up?""To get a head start on the traffic," Bree said."To get a head start on the traffic," Antonia agreed in indignation. "I mean, here we are, dancing and singing our little guts out, and all those folks want to do is get to bed early. I ask you, whatever happened to common courtesy? Whatever happened to decent manners? Doesn't anyone care about craft anymore? And on top of that, it's not even nice.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mary Stanton que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “This was our last night. We only had one curtain call, Bree. And I thought they were going to giv…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, complaining, disappointment, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: This was our last night. We only had one curtain call, Bree. And I thought they were going to give us a standing ovation, but no-o-o-. Do you know why half the audience stood up?""To get a head start on the traffic," Bree said."To get a head start on the traffic," Antonia agreed in indignation. "I mean, here we are, dancing and singing our little guts out, and all those folks want to do is get to bed early. I ask you, whatever happened to common courtesy? Whatever happened to decent manners? Doesn't anyone care about craft anymore? And on top of that, it's not even nice.

texto: Forget the garden rake. Remember that time you dived over the desk at that guy in moot court? Had him by the throat in two seconds flat, that's what I heard.""You heard wrong.""And they suspended you for how long?" Antonia innocently asked."A day. And I apologized. Actually I crawled like a slug and ate dirt," Bree said ruefully. "But that was years ago, and have I pulled a stunt like that again? No, I have not.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Stanton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Forget the garden rake. Remember that time you dived over the desk at that guy in moot court? Had…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, anger, groveling pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e groveling.
